And at the hour of twelve they were led to Charing Cross and cloaked in shame with heads bowed they trod the steps to the pillory, and let it be known that there was not any want of low lived men and women, boys and girls, thieves and miscreants of every description, flashing their wicked grins and gnashing their teeth, each as if an unblemished soul, to increase the misery of these debased wretches. Their cruelty without bounds, they would stop only when they ceased to be amused, or at which hour the villain did perish.
